reviews.comment:
Edit: Just got our ‘21 Pilot back from them and they’re still awesome. Great work by some cool people.

Original Review: Brought my '19 Civic Hatch to them for tinting and couldn't be happier. They were super fast and responsive, and the prices are reasonable. Will definitely be using them again in the future to get my wife's car done.

reviews.comment: Frederick window tint is simply amazing.  I have had nothing but positive experiences with them.  I had a bunch of questions before hand about getting my new rav4 tinted.  And they answered every single one of them.  Definitely made me feel comfortable about getting the work done there.   The prices prices were great as well and pretty reasonable with everything else around.   I already want to get more work done.  And I will 100% be going back soon

reviewReply.comment: Thank you for your business Mark! We appreciate the review!

reviews.comment: Joe did an awesome job and Sharyn was awesome with scheduling, helping me understand the different tints so I can choose the right one for me, and was a pleasure to work with. The whole experience was outstanding and I highly recommend them!

reviews.comment: After now having the tints for couple of years. The tints starting to develop bubbles and I purchased their best tint..

reviewReply.comment: Hi Sebastian. All of our film lines from 2017 and on have ALL had lifetime warranties that cover fading, bubbling, cracking and peeling. Bring your invoice in and we'd be happy to address any issues. We haven't been made known of this issue and I think it's unfair to leave a negative review for us or any other business if you haven't even given them a chance to address the issue. Our # is 240-415-8527. You can call or text to reach us. -FWT

reviews.comment: This is an amazing company I purchased a new Silverado took it to them and they tinted the entire truck with no problem even when I didn’t have an appointment,  no bubbles or anything on my tint even while It’s drying. that same day I scheduled an appointment for my wife’s vehicle to get the two front windows tinted for that following day,  they had me come in early to fit me in to the schedule I highly recommend this company very professional and they treat you as if they have known you their entire life.

reviewReply.comment: Thank you so much Derrick! We're glad you came to us!
